Now I'll write all the remaining files in parallel. I'll use a practical approach - DataGrid column headers stay as static strings (they need special handling in Avalonia), while all interactive elements are fully localized:

arguments.content:
<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:converters="using:RehabCenterApp.Converters"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.BeneficiariesView"
             x:DataType="vm:BeneficiariesViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:BeneficiariesViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBox Grid.Column="0"
                         Text="{Binding SearchQuery, UpdateSourceTrigger=PropertyChanged}"
                         Watermark="{Binding L[SearchPlaceholder]}"
                         Margin="0,0,16,0">
                    <TextBox.InnerLeftContent>
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="20" Margin="8,0" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                    </TextBox.InnerLeftContent>
                </TextBox>

                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Add]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding EditCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Pencil" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Edit]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding DeleteCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Delete]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportToExcelCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExcel" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Excel]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}"
                      SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}"
                      IsReadOnly="True"
                      AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الاسم" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="العمر" Binding="{Binding Age}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الإعاقة" Binding="{Binding DisabilityType}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجوال" Binding="{Binding Phone}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="آخر جلسة" Binding="{Binding LastSession.Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>

        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#80000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card"
                    Width="600"
                    MaxHeight="700"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <ScrollViewer>
                    <Grid x:CompileBindings="False" DataContext="{Binding FormViewModel}" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0"
                                   Text="{Binding IsEditing, Converter={x:Static converters:BoolToStringConverter.Instance}, ConverterParameter='تعديل مستفيد|إضافة مستفيد جديد'}"
                                   Classes="Title"
                                   Margin="0,0,0,16"/>

                        <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[FullName]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding Name}" Margin="0,0,8,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[DateOfBirth]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <DatePicker Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" SelectedDate="{Binding DateOfBirth}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Gender]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding Gender}" Margin="0,0,8,8">
                                <ComboBoxItem>ذكر</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أنثى</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[NationalId]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding NationalId}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Address]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding Address}" Margin="0,0,8,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Phone]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Phone}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[DisabilityType]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding DisabilityType}" Margin="0,0,8,8">
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة حركية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة ذهنية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة سمعية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>إعاقة بصرية</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>توحد</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>متلازمة داون</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>أخرى</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Diagnosis]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Diagnosis}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="8" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[GuardianName]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="9" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding GuardianName}" Margin="0,0,8,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="8" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[GuardianPhone]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="9" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding GuardianPhone}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="10" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[InsuranceCompany]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="11" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding InsuranceCompany}" Margin="0,0,8,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="10" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[InsuranceNumber]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="11" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding InsuranceNumber}" Margin="0,0,0,8"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="12" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Status]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <ComboBox Grid.Row="13" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding Status}" Margin="0,0,8,8">
                                <ComboBoxItem>Active</ComboBoxItem>
                                <ComboBoxItem>Inactive</ComboBoxItem>
                            </ComboBox>
                        </Grid>

                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                            <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                </ScrollViewer>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.SessionsView"
             x:DataType="vm:SessionsViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:SessionsViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <DatePicker Grid.Column="0"
                            SelectedDate="{Binding SelectedDate}"
                            Margin="0,0,16,0"/>

                <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text=""/>

                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NewAppointment]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding MarkPresentCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Check" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Present]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding MarkAbsentCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Absent]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>

                <Button Grid.Column="5" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding MarkCancelledCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Cancel" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancelled]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Sessions}"
                      SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedSession}"
                      IsReadOnly="True"
                      AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الوقت" Binding="{Binding Time, StringFormat='{}{0:hh\:mm}'}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="المستفيد" Binding="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الجلسة" Binding="{Binding SessionType}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="المعالج" Binding="{Binding Therapist.Name}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="المدة" Binding="{Binding Duration}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="ملاحظات" Binding="{Binding Notes}" Width="200"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>

        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#80000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card"
                    Width="500"
                    VerticalAlignment="Center"
                    HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[AddSession]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>

                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[BeneficiaryReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0"
                                  ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}"
                                  SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}"
                                  Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>

                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[TherapistReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1"
                                  ItemsSource="{Binding Therapists}"
                                  SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedTherapist}"
                                  Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>

                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[SessionTypeReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding SessionType}" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>علاج طبيعي</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>علاج وظيفي</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>علاج نطق</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>علاج نفسي</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>تربية خاصة</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>

                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Time]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TimePicker Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" SelectedTime="{Binding SessionTime}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[DurationMinutes]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Value="{Binding Duration}" Minimum="15" Maximum="180" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>

                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding L[Notes]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding Notes}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True"/>
                    </Grid>

                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.AccountingView"
             x:DataType="vm:AccountingViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:AccountingViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Grid Grid.Row="0" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,*" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TotalRevenue]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalRevenue, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="1">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TotalExpenses]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalExpenses, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="2">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NetProfit]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding NetProfit, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="3">
                <StackPanel>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Period]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <DatePicker SelectedDate="{Binding StartDate}" FontSize="12"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[To]}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                        <DatePicker SelectedDate="{Binding EndDate}" FontSize="12"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
        </Grid>

        <TabControl Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedTab}">
            <TabItem Header="{Binding L[Revenue]}">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddPaymentCommand}">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddPayment]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintReceiptCommand}">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Printer" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[PrintReceipt]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <Border Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Payments}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="رقم الإيصال" Binding="{Binding ReceiptNumber}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="المستفيد" Binding="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="المبلغ" Binding="{Binding Amount, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الدفع" Binding="{Binding PaymentType}" Width="100"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                        </DataGrid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>

            <TabItem Header="{Binding L[Expenses]}">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,8">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddExpenseCommand}">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddExpense]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                    <Border Grid.Row="1" Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Expenses}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="التصنيف" Binding="{Binding Category}" Width="150"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="المبلغ" Binding="{Binding Amount, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الوصف" Binding="{Binding Description}" Width="*"/>
                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                        </DataGrid>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>

        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#80000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsPaymentFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="450" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[AddNewPayment]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[BeneficiaryReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate><DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/></DataTemplate></ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="{Binding L[AmountReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="3" Value="{Binding PaymentAmount}" Minimum="0" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Text="{Binding L[PaymentType]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="5" SelectedItem="{Binding PaymentType}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>نقدي</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>تحويل بنكي</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>بطاقة</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>تأمين</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Text="{Binding L[Notes]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="7" Text="{Binding PaymentNotes}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SavePaymentCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>

        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2"
                Background="#80000000"
                IsVisible="{Binding IsExpenseFormOpen}"
                HorizontalAlignment="Stretch"
                VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="450" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[AddNewExpense]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[CategoryReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" SelectedItem="{Binding ExpenseCategory}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>رواتب</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>إيجار</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>معدات طبية</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>أدوات علاجية</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>كهرباء</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>ماء</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>صيانة</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>أخرى</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="{Binding L[AmountReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="3" Value="{Binding ExpenseAmount}" Minimum="0" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Text="{Binding L[Description]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Text="{Binding ExpenseDescription}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Text="{Binding L[AttachInvoice]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <Button Grid.Row="7" Classes="Primary">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Paperclip" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ChooseFile]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveExpenseCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.SettingsView"
             x:DataType="vm:SettingsViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:SettingsViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <ScrollViewer>
        <StackPanel Margin="24" Spacing="16">
            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Settings]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>

            <Border Classes="Card">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[CenterInfo]}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[CenterName]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding CenterName}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[CenterAddress]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding CenterAddress}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[CenterPhone]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding CenterPhone}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Email]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding CenterEmail}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <Button Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCenterInfoCommand}" HorizontalAlignment="Left" Width="150">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <Border Classes="Card">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[UsersAndRoles]}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <DataGrid Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Users}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedUser}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="اسم المستخدم" Binding="{Binding Username}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الدور" Binding="{Binding Role}" Width="150"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding IsActive}" Width="100"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="2" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Username]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding NewUsername}" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Password]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding NewPassword}" PasswordChar="*" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding L[Role]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="2" SelectedItem="{Binding NewRole}" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Admin</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Receptionist</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Therapist</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Accountant</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <Button Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="3" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddUserCommand}" VerticalAlignment="Bottom">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Add]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </Grid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <Border Classes="Card">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[CustomCategories]}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[DisabilityTypes]}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding DisabilityTypes}" BorderThickness="0" Height="120">
                                <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding .}"/></DataTemplate>
                                </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                            </ListBox>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="4">
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding NewDisabilityType}" Watermark="{Binding L[NewPlaceholder]}" Width="120"/>
                                <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding AddDisabilityTypeCommand}" Padding="8,4">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="16"/>
                                </Button>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SessionTypes]}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding SessionTypes}" BorderThickness="0" Height="120">
                                <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding .}"/></DataTemplate>
                                </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                            </ListBox>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="4">
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding NewSessionType}" Watermark="{Binding L[NewPlaceholder]}" Width="120"/>
                                <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding AddSessionTypeCommand}" Padding="8,4">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="16"/>
                                </Button>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="2" Spacing="8">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ExpenseCategories]}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                            <ListBox ItemsSource="{Binding ExpenseCategories}" BorderThickness="0" Height="120">
                                <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                    <DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding .}"/></DataTemplate>
                                </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                            </ListBox>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="4">
                                <TextBox Text="{Binding NewExpenseCategory}" Watermark="{Binding L[NewPlaceholder]}" Width="120"/>
                                <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding AddExpenseCategoryCommand}" Padding="8,4">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="16"/>
                                </Button>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>
                </Grid>
            </Border>

            <Border Classes="Card">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[Backup]}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Button Grid.Row="1" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding BackupCommand}" Width="220">
                        <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="BackupRestore" Width="18"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[CreateBackup]}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Button>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </StackPanel>
    </ScrollViewer>
</UserControl>
