<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:lvc="using:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Avalonia"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.AssessmentsView"
             x:DataType="vm:AssessmentsViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[StandardAssessments]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NewAssessment]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ViewProgressCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartLine" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TrackProgress]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExport" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Export]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="2*,1*" Margin="16">
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0" Padding="0">
                <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Assessments}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedAssessment}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                    <DataGrid.Columns>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="المستفيد" Binding="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="التقييم" Binding="{Binding AssessmentName}" Width="150"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="التصنيف" Binding="{Binding Category}" Width="120"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الدرجة" Binding="{Binding StandardScore}" Width="80"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="الشدة" Binding="{Binding SeverityLevel}" Width="100"/>
                        <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding AssessmentDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    </DataGrid.Columns>
                </DataGrid>
            </Border>
            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Spacing="16">
                <Border Classes="Card">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[ProgressChart]}" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="1" Series="{Binding ProgressSeries}" XAxes="{Binding XAxes}" Height="200"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </Grid>
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="500" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[NewAssessment]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[BeneficiaryReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate><DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/></DataTemplate></ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[AssessmentReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" SelectedItem="{Binding AssessmentName}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>GARS-2</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>WISC-V</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>GMFM</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>PEP-3</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>ABAS-3</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Other</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Category]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding Category}" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Cognitive</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Motor</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Behavioral</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Speech</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Sensory</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[RawScore]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Value="{Binding RawScore}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[StandardScore]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Value="{Binding StandardScore}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[SeverityLevel]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="1" SelectedItem="{Binding SeverityLevel}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Mild</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Moderate</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Severe</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Profound</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding L[Recommendations]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding Recommendations}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="8" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding L[Notes]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="9" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding Notes}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.HRManagementView"
             x:DataType="vm:HRManagementViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[HRManagement]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddEmployeeCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountPlus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddEmployee]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding RequestLeaveCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarPlus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[RequestLeave]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding EvaluateTherapistCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ChartBar" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Evaluate]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintPayrollCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CashRegister" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Payroll]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <TabControl Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedTab}">
            <TabItem Header="{Binding L[Employees]}">
                <Border Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                    <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Employees}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedEmployee}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الاسم" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الدور" Binding="{Binding Role}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجوال" Binding="{Binding Phone}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الراتب" Binding="{Binding Salary, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="تاريخ التوظيف" Binding="{Binding JoinDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="نشط" Binding="{Binding IsActive}" Width="80"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Border>
            </TabItem>
            <TabItem Header="{Binding L[LeaveRequests]}">
                <Border Classes="Card" Padding="0">
                    <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding LeaveRequests}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الموظف" Binding="{Binding Employee.Name}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="النوع" Binding="{Binding LeaveType}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="البداية" Binding="{Binding StartDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="النهاية" Binding="{Binding EndDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الأيام" Binding="{Binding DaysCount}" Width="60"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>
                </Border>
            </TabItem>
        </TabControl>
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsLeaveFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="450" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[RequestLeave]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[LeaveType]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" SelectedItem="{Binding LeaveType}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Annual</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Sick</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Emergency</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Unpaid</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="{Binding L[StartDate]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker Grid.Row="3" SelectedDate="{Binding LeaveStart}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Text="{Binding L[EndDate]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker Grid.Row="5" SelectedDate="{Binding LeaveEnd}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Text="{Binding L[Reason]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="7" Text="{Binding LeaveReason}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding RequestLeaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SubmitLeave]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.InventoryView"
             x:DataType="vm:InventoryViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[InventoryManagement]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding LowStockCount, StringFormat='Low Stock: {0}'}" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,16,0" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddItem]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding AddStockCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ArrowUpBold" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddStock]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding RemoveStockCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ArrowDownBold" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[RemoveStock]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Items}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الاسم" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التصنيف" Binding="{Binding Category}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الكمية" Binding="{Binding Quantity}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحد الأدنى" Binding="{Binding MinStockLevel}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="تكلفة الوحدة" Binding="{Binding UnitCost, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="450" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[AddInventoryItem]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[NameReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding ItemName}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Category]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" SelectedItem="{Binding Category}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Equipment</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Supplies</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Toys</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Furniture</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Quantity]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" Value="{Binding Quantity}" Minimum="0" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[MinStock]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Value="{Binding MinStock}" Minimum="1" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[UnitCost]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Value="{Binding UnitCost}" Minimum="0" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.WaitingListView"
             x:DataType="vm:WaitingListViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[WaitingList]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddEntry]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ConvertToBeneficiaryCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AccountConvert" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Convert]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ContactCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Phone" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Contact]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding DeleteCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Delete]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Entries}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedEntry}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الاسم" Binding="{Binding Name}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="العمر" Binding="{Binding DateOfBirth, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy}'}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الإعاقة" Binding="{Binding DisabilityType}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الأولوية" Binding="{Binding Priority}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="تاريخ التسجيل" Binding="{Binding RegistrationDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="500" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[NewWaitingEntry]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[NameReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding EntryName}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[DateOfBirth]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" SelectedDate="{Binding DateOfBirth}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[DisabilityType]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding DisabilityType}" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Physical</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Intellectual</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Hearing</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Visual</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Autism</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Down Syndrome</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Other</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[GuardianPhone]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding GuardianPhone}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Priority]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <NumericUpDown Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Value="{Binding Priority}" Minimum="1" Maximum="4" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Notes]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Notes}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.RemindersView"
             x:DataType="vm:RemindersViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Reminders]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NewReminder]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CompleteCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Check" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Complete]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding SnoozeCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AlarmSnooze" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Snooze]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1" Margin="16">
            <StackPanel Spacing="16">
                <Border Classes="Card" Background="#fff5f5">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="AlertCircle" Width="24" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Overdue]}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" FontSize="16"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding OverdueReminders.Count, StringFormat='({0})'}" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <ListBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding OverdueReminders}" BorderThickness="0">
                            <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                                        <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="50" Width="12" Height="12" Background="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Title}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding DateTime, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}'}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ListBox>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <Border Classes="Card" Background="#fffaf0">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarToday" Width="24" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Today]}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}" FontSize="16"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TodayReminders.Count, StringFormat='({0})'}" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <ListBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding TodayReminders}" BorderThickness="0">
                            <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                                        <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="50" Width="12" Height="12" Background="{StaticResource WarningBrush}" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Title}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding DateTime, StringFormat='{}{0:HH:mm}'}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ListBox>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>

                <Border Classes="Card">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarClock" Width="24" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Upcoming]}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}" FontSize="16"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding UpcomingReminders.Count, StringFormat='({0})'}" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <ListBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding UpcomingReminders}" BorderThickness="0">
                            <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                                <DataTemplate>
                                    <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                                        <Border Grid.Column="0" CornerRadius="50" Width="12" Height="12" Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Title}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Description}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="{Binding DateTime, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm}'}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12"/>
                                    </Grid>
                                </DataTemplate>
                            </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ListBox>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
            </StackPanel>
        </ScrollViewer>

        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="450" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[NewReminder]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[TitleReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding Title}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Description]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding Description}" Height="60" TextWrapping="Wrap" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[DateReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <DatePicker Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" SelectedDate="{Binding ReminderDate}" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[TimeReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TimePicker Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="1" SelectedTime="{Binding ReminderTime}" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Type]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="0" SelectedItem="{Binding Type}" Margin="0,0,8,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Session</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Payment</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>FollowUp</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>General</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="6" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[Priority]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="7" Grid.Column="1" SelectedItem="{Binding Priority}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>High</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Medium</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Low</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="8" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Text="{Binding L[LinkBeneficiary]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="9" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}" SelectedItem="{Binding LinkedBeneficiary}">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate><DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/></DataTemplate></ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:lvc="using:LiveChartsCore.SkiaSharpView.Avalonia"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.AnalyticsView"
             x:DataType="vm:AnalyticsViewModel">
    <ScrollViewer>
        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*" Margin="24">
            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[AdvancedAnalytics]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,24"/>

            <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,*,*" Margin="0,0,0,24">
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TotalBeneficiaries]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalBeneficiaries}" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="1">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[MonthlyRevenue]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding MonthlyRevenue, StringFormat='{}{0:C}'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="2">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SessionCompletion]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding SessionCompletionRate, StringFormat='{}{0:F1}%'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="3">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ParentSatisfaction]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding ParentSatisfactionRate, StringFormat='{}{0:F1}%'}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="4" Background="#fff5f5">
                    <StackPanel>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AtRisk]}" Classes="Subtitle" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding AtRiskBeneficiaries}" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
            </Grid>

            <Grid Grid.Row="2" ColumnDefinitions="*,*" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto">
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row="0">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[RevenueTrend]}" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <lvc:CartesianChart Grid.Row="1" Series="{Binding RevenueTrendSeries}" XAxes="{Binding XAxesMonths}" Height="250"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="1" Grid.Row="0">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[DisabilityDistribution]}" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        <lvc:PieChart Grid.Row="1" Series="{Binding DisabilityDistributionSeries}" Height="250"/>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
                <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0" Grid.ColumnSpan="2" Grid.Row="1">
                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="12" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AIPredictions]}" FontWeight="Bold" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding GeneratePredictionsCommand}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Brain" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[GeneratePredictions]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportAnalyticsCommand}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExport" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Export]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <DataGrid Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Predictions}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="المستفيد" Binding="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="المجال" Binding="{Binding Domain}" Width="120"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالي" Binding="{Binding CurrentScore}" Width="80"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="3 أشهر" Binding="{Binding PredictedScore3Months}" Width="80"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="6 أشهر" Binding="{Binding PredictedScore6Months}" Width="80"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="12 شهر" Binding="{Binding PredictedScore12Months}" Width="80"/>
                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الخطر" Binding="{Binding RiskLevel}" Width="80"/>
                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                        </DataGrid>
                    </Grid>
                </Border>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>
    </ScrollViewer>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.ClinicalReportsView"
             x:DataType="vm:ClinicalReportsViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[ClinicalReports]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NewReport]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ApproveCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Check" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Approve]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Printer" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Print]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SignDigitallyCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Signature" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Sign]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Reports}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedReport}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="المستفيد" Binding="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="النوع" Binding="{Binding ReportType}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding ReportDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="أعده" Binding="{Binding PreparedBy.Name}" Width="150"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#80000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="600" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[NewClinicalReport]}" Classes="Title" Margin="0,0,0,16"/>
                    <Grid Grid.Row="1" RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[BeneficiaryReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBox.ItemTemplate><DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/></DataTemplate></ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Text="{Binding L[ReportType]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <ComboBox Grid.Row="3" SelectedItem="{Binding ReportType}" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                            <ComboBoxItem>Initial</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Progress</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Discharge</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Referral</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Text="{Binding L[ContentReq]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Text="{Binding Content}" Height="150" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True"/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.CorrespondenceView"
             x:DataType="vm:CorrespondenceViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:CorrespondenceViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBox Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding SearchQuery}" Watermark="{Binding L[SearchPlaceholder2]}" Margin="0,0,16,0">
                    <TextBox.InnerLeftContent>
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Magnify" Width="20" Margin="8,0" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                    </TextBox.InnerLeftContent>
                </TextBox>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NewTransaction]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding DeleteCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Delete]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Items}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedItem}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="النوع" Binding="{Binding Type}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الرقم" Binding="{Binding Number}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجهة" Binding="{Binding Entity}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الموضوع" Binding="{Binding Subject}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.FormsView"
             x:DataType="vm:FormsViewModel">

    <Design.DataContext>
        <vm:FormsViewModel/>
    </Design.DataContext>

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Text="{Binding L[FormsAndPrinting]}" Classes="Title" Margin="24,24,24,0"/>
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="250,*" Margin="24">
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="0">
                <StackPanel Spacing="8">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[FormTemplates]}" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                    <ListBox SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedFormIndex}">
                        <ListBoxItem>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="20"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[BeneficiaryRegistration]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ListBoxItem>
                        <ListBoxItem>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="20"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[InitialAssessment]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ListBoxItem>
                        <ListBoxItem>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="20"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[IEPPlan]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ListBoxItem>
                        <ListBoxItem>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="20"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[FollowUpReport]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ListBoxItem>
                        <ListBoxItem>
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="20"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[GuardianConsent]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ListBoxItem>
                    </ListBox>
                </StackPanel>
            </Border>
            <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Column="1">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="*,Auto">
                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="#f7fafc" BorderBrush="#e2e8f0" BorderThickness="1" CornerRadius="8" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[PrintPreview]}" HorizontalAlignment="Center" VerticalAlignment="Center" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    </Border>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12">
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintCommand}">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Printer" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Print]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding ExportPdfCommand}">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExport" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ExportPDF]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Grid>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.GamificationView"
             x:DataType="vm:GamificationViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[Gamification]}" Classes="Title" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                <Button Grid.Column="1" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AwardAchievementCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Trophy" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[AddAchievement]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding PrintCertificateCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Certificate" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Print]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,*,Auto,*">
                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="0" Kind="Account" Width="48" Height="48" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Margin="8,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Beneficiary]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <ComboBox ItemsSource="{Binding Beneficiaries}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedBeneficiary}">
                        <ComboBox.ItemTemplate><DataTemplate><TextBlock Text="{Binding Name}"/></DataTemplate></ComboBox.ItemTemplate>
                    </ComboBox>
                </StackPanel>
                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="2" Kind="Star" Width="48" Height="48" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="3" Margin="8,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Points]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalPoints}" FontSize="28" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                </StackPanel>
                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="4" Kind="Trophy" Width="48" Height="48" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="5" Margin="8,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Level]}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding LevelTitle}" FontSize="24" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                </StackPanel>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="2" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Achievements}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="العنوان" Binding="{Binding Title}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التصنيف" Binding="{Binding Category}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="النقاط" Binding="{Binding Points}" Width="80"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding AchievementDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الوصف" Binding="{Binding Description}" Width="*"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.GovernmentReportsView"
             x:DataType="vm:GovernmentReportsViewModel">
    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="0" Margin="16,16,16,0">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*,*,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[ReportType]}" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                <ComboBox Grid.Column="1" SelectedItem="{Binding ReportType}" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                    <ComboBoxItem>Monthly</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Quarterly</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Annual</ComboBoxItem>
                </ComboBox>
                <TextBlock Grid.Column="2" Text="Authority" VerticalAlignment="Center" Margin="0,0,8,0"/>
                <ComboBox Grid.Column="3" SelectedItem="{Binding Authority}" Margin="0,0,16,0">
                    <ComboBoxItem>Ministry</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Insurance</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Municipality</ComboBoxItem>
                </ComboBox>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding GenerateCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocumentPlus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[GenerateReport]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="5" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileExport" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ExportPDF]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="6" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding SubmitCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Send" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SubmitReport]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Reports}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع التقرير" Binding="{Binding ReportType}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الجهة" Binding="{Binding Authority}" Width="150"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="بداية الفترة" Binding="{Binding PeriodStart, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="نهاية الفترة" Binding="{Binding PeriodEnd, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="تاريخ الرفع" Binding="{Binding SubmissionDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="VideoPlus" Width="18"/>

                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding StartSessionCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Video" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[StartSession]}"/>

                            <ComboBoxItem>Teams</ComboBoxItem>
                            <ComboBoxItem>Google Meet</ComboBoxItem>
                        </ComboBox>
                        <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Text="{Binding L[Link]}" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                        <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Text="{Binding MeetingLink}" Watermark="https://..."/>
                    </Grid>
                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Save]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/><TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>

                    <ComboBoxItem>All</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Medical</ComboBoxItem>
                    <ComboBoxItem>Legal</ComboBoxItem>

                    <ComboBoxItem>Educational</ComboBoxItem>
                </ComboBox>
                <Button Grid.Column="2" Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding AddCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Plus" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[UploadDocument]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="3" Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding OcrCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Ocr" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="OCR"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Classes="Danger" Command="{Binding DeleteCommand}" Margin="4,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Delete" Width="18"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Delete]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>
        <Border Classes="Card" Grid.Row="1" Margin="16" Padding="0">
            <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding Documents}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedDocument}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                <DataGrid.Columns>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="العنوان" Binding="{Binding Title}" Width="*"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التصنيف" Binding="{Binding Category}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="النوع" Binding="{Binding DocumentType}" Width="100"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding DocumentDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="السرية" Binding="{Binding Confidentiality}" Width="120"/>
                    <DataGridTextColumn Header="مفهرس" Binding="{Binding IsIndexed}" Width="80"/>
                </DataGrid.Columns>
            </DataGrid>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

Messages:
  - ### Models Overview
The project contains several domain models located in the `Models/` directory. Most inherit from `BaseEntity` (providing `Id`, `CreatedAt`, `UpdatedAt`, and `IsDeleted` properties).

**Key Models:**
- **Session:** Tracks therapy sessions (Beneficiary, Therapist, Type, Date/Time, Duration, Status, Notes, Rating).
- **Employee:** Represents staff, including therapists (Name, Role, Phone, Salary, JoinDate, IsActive).
- **Beneficiary:** Patient/client data (Name, Age, Gender, Disability Type, Phone, etc.).
- **Assessment:** Clinical evaluations.
- **Payment & Expense:** Financial tracking.
- **Other Models:** `User`, `AppSetting`, `Correspondence`, `ParentCommunication`, `Reminder`, `WaitingList`, `AdvancedFeatures`.

### SessionsViewModel
Located at `ViewModels/SessionsViewModel.cs`, it handles the UI logic for the session management view.
- **Data Properties:** `Sessions` (ObservableCollection), `Beneficiaries`, `Therapists`.
- **Form Properties:** `SelectedDate`, `SelectedSession`, `SelectedBeneficiary`, `SelectedTherapist`, `SessionType`, `SessionTime`, `Duration`, `Notes`, `IsFormOpen`.
- **Commands:** `LoadCommand`, `AddCommand`, `SaveCommand`, `CancelCommand`, `MarkPresentCommand`, `MarkAbsentCommand`, `MarkCancelledCommand`.
- **Key Methods:**
    - `LoadSessionsAsync()`: Fetches sessions from `DatabaseService` for the `SelectedDate`.
    - `LoadDropdownsAsync()`: Loads beneficiaries and therapists (filtered by role "Therapist").
    - `SaveSessionAsync()`: Creates a new `Session` and persists it.
    - `UpdateStatusAsync(string status)`: Updates the status of the selected session.

### DatabaseService (Sessions & Therapists)
Located at `Services/DatabaseService.cs`, it provides the persistence layer using Entity Framework Core.
- **Sessions:**
    - `GetSessionsAsync(DateTime? date, int? beneficiaryId)`: Includes `Beneficiary` and `Therapist` data, filters by date/beneficiary, and excludes deleted records.
    - `GetTodaySessionsAsync()`: Helper for current day sessions.
    - `AddSessionAsync(Session session)` / `UpdateSessionAsync(Session session)`.
    - `GetTodaySessionsCountAsync()`: Statistical helper.
- **Therapists (Employees):**
    - `GetEmployeesAsync(string? role)`: Returns a list of employees, optionally filtered by role (e.g., "Therapist").
    - `AddEmployeeAsync(Employee employee)`.

### Export and Print Utilities
- **PrintService (`Services/PrintService.cs`):**
    - Uses `iTextSharp` for PDF generation.
    - `GenerateReceiptAsync(Payment payment, ...)`: Generates a payment receipt PDF.
    - `ExportBeneficiariesToPdfAsync(List<Beneficiary> beneficiaries)`: Generates a tabular PDF report of beneficiaries.

#### DbSets (Lines 9-51):

#### OnModelCreating (Lines 64-89):
- **Initial Admin:** Seeds a default user (Username: `admin`, Role: `Admin`) with a hashed password (Line 68).
- **Default Settings:** Seeds application-wide configurations like `CenterName`, `Theme`, `AutoBackup`, and `WhatsAppEnabled` (Line 79).

---

### LoginViewModel.cs (Login Flow & Role Handling)
**File Path:** `ViewModels/LoginViewModel.cs`

#### Login Flow (`LoginAsync`, Lines 61-105):
1. **Validation:** Checks for non-empty username/password (Line 68).
2. **User Retrieval:** Calls `_dbService.GetUserByUsernameAsync(Username)` (Line 75).
3. **Password Verification:** Uses `PasswordHasher.VerifyPassword` to compare input with `user.PasswordHash` (Line 83).
4. **Session Persistence:** Saves `CurrentUser` (username) and `CurrentRole` (role) to the database settings table via `_dbService.SetSettingAsync` (Lines 90-91).
5. **Audit Logging:** Logs the login event (Line 92).
6. **Navigation:** Executes the `_onLoginSuccess` callback (Line 94).

#### Role Handling:
Roles are stored in the `User.Role` property and persisted to `AppSettings` upon login. The application supports roles such as **Admin**, though others are implied by the entity structure (e.g., `Employee`).

---
name: project_tasks
description: Create and manage persistent project tasks visible to the user.
---

# Project Tasks

Manage persistent, user-visible project tasks that the main agent or a task agent can execute. Only task agents run in isolated environments. Use these to track high-level deliverables and milestones that the user cares about.

## Project Tasks vs Internal Task List

| Aspect | Project Tasks | Internal Task List |
|--------|--------------|-------------------|
| Purpose | User-visible deliverables | Agent's own work breakdown |
| Persistence | Persistent across sessions (PID2) | Current session only |
| Visibility | Shown to the user | Internal to the agent |
| Granularity | High-level milestones | Detailed implementation steps |

## When to Use

- Tracking user-requested features or deliverables
- Breaking a project into visible milestones
- Communicating progress to the user
- Managing tasks that persist across sessions

## When NOT to Use

- Internal agent work breakdown (use the internal task list)
- Temporary implementation steps
- Sub-tasks that only matter to the agent

## Task Identifiers

Tasks are identified by `taskRef` — a short string like `"#1"`, `"#2"`, `"#3"`. Use it in all API calls and when referring to tasks in conversation: "Task #1 (Add authentication)".

## Available Functions

### getProjectTask(taskRef)

Get a project task by task ref.

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to retrieve |

**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`

**Example:**

```javascript
const task = await getProjectTask({ taskRef: "#1" });
// "Task #1 (Add authentication)"
```

### updateProjectTask(taskRef, title=None, description=None, filePath=None, dependsOn=None, artifactKinds=None)

Update an existing project task's content. Only provided fields are updated. Editing a plan file alone does NOT update the task — you must call `updateProjectTask` to persist changes.

**Parameters:**

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to update |
| `title` | str | No | New title |
| `description` | str | No | New description as an inline string. Use this when there is no plan file. Mutually exclusive with `filePath`. |
| `filePath` | str | No | Path to a plan file under `.local/tasks/`. If you've created/edited a plan file, pass its path here and its content becomes the new description. Mutually exclusive with `description`. |
| `dependsOn` | array of str | No | Full list of dependency task refs (replaces existing) |
| `artifactKinds` | array | No | Updated artifact kind tags. Pass `[]` to clear stale tags when the task is no longer artifact-producing. |

**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`

**Examples:**

```javascript
// Edited plan file → push its content as the new description.
await updateProjectTask({
  taskRef: "#1",
  title: "Agentic canvas prototype (tldraw)",
```

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of .local/skills/project_tasks/SKILL.md (lines 80-199 of 362)

    82→});
    83→
