    85→await updateProjectTask({
    86→  taskRef: "#1",
    87→  description: "Add a Canvas toggle button to the preview pane.",
    88→});
    89→```
    90→
    91→### markTaskInProgress(taskRef)
    92→
    93→Resume work on an IMPLEMENTED task. Call this before making further changes to a task that was already marked complete.
    94→
    95→**Parameters:**
    96→
    97→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
    98→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
    99→| `taskRef` | str | Yes | Task ref to resume |
   100→
   101→**Returns:** Dict with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   102→
   103→**Example:**
   104→
   105→```javascript
   106→await markTaskInProgress({ taskRef: "#1" });
   107→```
   108→
   109→### searchProjectTasks(query, locale=None, limit=None)
   110→
   111→Search project tasks by text query, ordered by relevance.
   112→
   113→**Parameters:**
   114→
   115→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   116→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   117→| `query` | str | Yes | Search query. Supports boolean syntax: `"exact phrase"`, `foo bar` (both words), `foo OR bar`, `-foo` (exclude) |
   118→| `locale` | str | No | BCP 47 locale of the query (e.g. `"en"`, `"es"`, `"fr"`). Pass for non-English queries for better stemming. |
   119→| `limit` | int | No | Maximum number of results (default: 20) |
   120→
   121→**Returns:** List of dicts, each with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `score`, `matchType`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   122→
   123→**Example:**
   124→
   125→```javascript
   126→// Simple keyword search
   127→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "authentication" });
   128→
   129→// Boolean syntax: find auth tasks that aren't about login
   130→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "authentication -login", limit: 5 });
   131→
   132→// Exact phrase
   133→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: '"payment integration"' });
   134→
   135→// Non-English query — pass locale for better stemming
   136→const results = await searchProjectTasks({ query: "autenticación", locale: "es" });
   137→
   138→for (const r of results) {
   139→    console.log(`${r.taskRef} (${r.title}) — score: ${r.score}`);
   140→}
   141→```
   142→
   143→### listProjectTasks(state=None, taskRefs=None, includeDescription=False)
   144→
   145→List project tasks, optionally filtered by state or specific task refs.
   146→
   147→**Parameters:**
   148→
   149→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   150→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   151→| `state` | str | No | Filter by state (e.g., "IN_PROGRESS") |
   152→| `taskRefs` | array of str | No | List of specific task refs to retrieve |
   153→| `includeDescription` | bool | No | Whether to include the task description (default: false) |
   154→
   155→**Returns:** List of dicts, each with `taskRef`, `title`, `state`, `dependsOn`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` (plus `description` if `includeDescription` is true). `dependsOn` lists dependency task refs also in the result set; dependencies pointing outside the `taskRefs` filter are omitted.
   156→
   157→**Example:**
   158→
   159→```javascript
   160→const allTasks = await listProjectTasks();
   161→for (const task of allTasks) {
   162→    console.log(`  - Task ${task.taskRef} (${task.title})`);
   163→}
   164→```
   165→
   166→### bulkCreateProjectTasks(tasks)
   167→
   168→Create multiple tasks at once with dependency relationships. Each task is created in PROPOSED state. The plan file content becomes the task description.
   169→
   170→**Parameters:**
   171→
   172→| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
   173→|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
   174→| `tasks` | array | Yes | List of task objects (see below) |
   175→
   176→Each task object:
   177→
   178→| Field | Type | Required | Description |
   179→|-------|------|----------|-------------|
   180→| `id` | str | No | Alias within the batch, referenced by other tasks' `dependsOn`. Auto-generated if omitted. |
   181→| `title` | str | Yes | Short title for the task |
   182→| `filePath` | str | Yes | Path to the plan file (e.g. `.local/tasks/payment-integration.md`). The file content becomes the task description. |
   183→| `dependsOn` | array | No | List of `id` values from other tasks in this batch, or task refs (`"#1"`, `"#2"`) of already-accepted tasks. Never depend on PROPOSED — only PENDING or later. Tasks within the same batch may depend on each other freely. |
   184→| `artifactKinds` | array | No | Artifact kinds for tasks creating new artifacts. Values: `web`, `mobile`, `video`, `slides`, `automation`, `data-app`, `design`. Omit for code-only or non-artifact work. |
   185→
   186→**Returns:** List of created task dicts with `taskRef`, `title`, `description`, `state`, `dependsOn`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`
   187→
   188→**Examples:**
   189→
   190→```javascript
   191→// Single task (no dependencies)
   192→const created = await bulkCreateProjectTasks({
   193→    tasks: [
   194→        {
   195→            title: "Launch microsite",
   196→            filePath: ".local/tasks/launch-microsite.md",
   197→            artifactKinds: ["web"],
   198→        },
   199→    ]

arguments.content:
# Therapist Dashboard + Schedule Export + LAN Access Control

## Objective
Build three interconnected feature sets on top of the existing RehabCenterApp:
1. Daily therapist schedule export (PDF + Excel) and print
2. Full therapist-role dashboard (separate view from Admin) with daily session reports, child worksheets, child history, and export to PDF/Word
3. LAN-only access control for therapist logins (center IP subnet check)

---

## Scope

### A — Daily Schedule Export/Print (Sessions view)
- Add **Export PDF**, **Export Excel**, and **Print** buttons to `SessionsView.axaml`
- Schedule is grouped by therapist, showing all cases for the day with: beneficiary name, session type, time, duration (minutes), status
- `PrintService.ExportDailyScheduleToPdfAsync()` — A4 landscape PDF, branded header (center name/date), table per therapist
- `ExcelExporter.ExportDailyScheduleAsync()` — styled Excel workbook, one sheet per therapist
- `SessionsViewModel` — add `ExportPdfScheduleCommand`, `ExportExcelScheduleCommand`, `PrintScheduleCommand`

### B — New Data Models
**`Models/TherapistReport.cs`**
- `SessionId` (FK), `Session` nav
- `TherapistId` (FK), `Therapist` (Employee) nav  
- `ReportDate`
- `ActivitiesPerformed` (text)
- `ChildResponse` (text)
- `GoalsAddressed` (text) — references IEP goals
- `Homework` (text) — assigned homework for parent
- `BehaviorNotes` (text)
- `OverallRating` (int 1–5)
- `NextSessionPlan` (text)

**`Models/SessionWorksheet.cs`**
- `SessionId` (FK), `Session` nav
- `WorksheetType` (e.g. Motor, Cognitive, Speech, Behavioral)
- `ChecklistItems` (JSON-serialized list of items + completion)
- `MaterialsUsed` (text)
- `ObservationNotes` (text)
- `PhotoPaths` (text — semicolon-delimited file paths)

### C — Database & Context
- Add `DbSet<TherapistReport>` and `DbSet<SessionWorksheet>` to `AppDbContext`
- Seed two new `AppSetting` rows: `"AllowedSubnet"` = `"192.168."` and `"TherapistPortalEnabled"` = `"True"`
- `DatabaseService` new methods:
  - `GetTherapistReportsAsync(int? therapistId, int? beneficiaryId)` — includes Session + Beneficiary
  - `AddTherapistReportAsync(TherapistReport)` / `UpdateTherapistReportAsync`
  - `GetSessionWorksheetsAsync(int sessionId)`
  - `AddSessionWorksheetAsync(SessionWorksheet)` / `UpdateSessionWorksheetAsync`
  - `GetChildHistoryAsync(int beneficiaryId)` — sessions + reports + assessments for a child, ordered by date

### D — Word Export Service
- Install package: `DocumentFormat.OpenXml` (already common in .NET ecosystem)
- **`Services/WordExportService.cs`**:
  - `ExportChildHistoryAsync(Beneficiary, sessions+reports)` → formatted `.docx`
    - Cover page: child name, ID, date range, center logo placeholder
    - Table of contents
    - One section per session: date, therapist, activities, child response, goals, homework
  - `ExportDailyReportAsync(TherapistReport)` → single-session report `.docx`
    - Professional layout with center header, child info, report body sections

### E — LAN Access Service
- **`Services/LanAccessService.cs`**:
  - `GetLocalIpAddresses()` — returns all local IPv4 addresses of the machine
  - `IsAllowedAccess(string allowedSubnet)` — returns `true` if any local IP starts with the subnet string
  - `GetAllowedSubnetAsync()` — reads `AllowedSubnet` from `DatabaseService`
- **Login flow** (`LoginViewModel`):
  - After password verification, if `user.Role == "Therapist"`, call `LanAccessService.IsAllowedAccess()`
  - If fails: show error "Access denied: connect from within the center's network"
  - If passes: route to `TherapistDashboardView` instead of `MainWindow` (Admin view)
- **Admin** login: no IP restriction, always routes to `MainWindow`

### F — Therapist Dashboard View + ViewModel
**`ViewModels/TherapistDashboardViewModel.cs`**
- Properties: `TodaySessions`, `SelectedSession`, `SelectedBeneficiary`, `Reports`, `Worksheets`, `IsReportFormOpen`
- On load: fetch sessions for the logged-in therapist for today
- Commands:
  - `LoadCommand` — load today's sessions + recent reports
  - `OpenReportCommand` — open report form for selected session
  - `ViewChildHistoryCommand` — show history popup for selected beneficiary
  - `ExportHistoryPdfCommand` — export child history as PDF
  - `ExportHistoryWordCommand` — export child history as Word doc
  - `ToggleLanguageCommand` — same bilingual toggle as admin
  - `LogoutCommand` — return to login

**`Views/TherapistDashboardView.axaml`**
- Left panel: today's session list (time, beneficiary name, session type, duration, status) with status badge colors
- Right panel (selected session): session details + "Write Report" / "View Past Reports" / "Add Worksheet" tabs
- Report form (inline modal): all `TherapistReport` fields as labeled text areas + rating stars
- Child history panel: chronological list of sessions+reports; export buttons at top
- Language toggle button (top-right)

**`Views/TherapistWindow.axaml` + `.axaml.cs`**
- Thin wrapper window for therapist role (similar to `MainWindow` but only hosts `TherapistDashboardView`)
- Title: center name + " — Therapist Portal"
- `FlowDirection` bound to `L.FlowDir`

### G — Role Routing in App.axaml.cs + LoginViewModel
- `LoginViewModel` receives two callbacks: `onAdminSuccess` and `onTherapistSuccess`
- `App.axaml.cs` handles both:
  - Admin → show `MainWindow`
  - Therapist → show `TherapistWindow`
- `TherapistWindow` is a standard `Window`; it is modal-independent from `MainWindow`
- Admin can still see all therapist reports inside `MainWindow` via a new "Therapist Reports" sub-section in the Sessions or HR Management area

### H — Settings: LAN Configuration (Admin only)
- `SettingsView.axaml` — new "Network" section with:
  - `AllowedSubnet` TextBox (e.g. "192.168.1." or "10.0.0.")
  - `TherapistPortalEnabled` toggle
  - Explanation label: "Therapist logins are only allowed from IPs matching this prefix"
- `SettingsViewModel` — load/save these two settings

### I — Localization Keys (LocalizationService.cs)
Add keys for all new UI strings in both Arabic and English (approx 30 new keys covering therapist dashboard, report form fields, history view, export buttons, LAN settings).

---

## Files Created (new)
- `Models/TherapistReport.cs`
- `Models/SessionWorksheet.cs`
- `ViewModels/TherapistDashboardViewModel.cs`
- `Views/TherapistDashboardView.axaml` + `.axaml.cs`
- `Views/TherapistWindow.axaml` + `.axaml.cs`
- `Services/WordExportService.cs`
- `Services/LanAccessService.cs`

## Files Modified
- `Services/AppDbContext.cs`
- `Services/DatabaseService.cs`
- `Services/PrintService.cs`
- `Helpers/ExcelExporter.cs`
- `ViewModels/SessionsViewModel.cs`
- `Views/SessionsView.axaml`
- `ViewModels/LoginViewModel.cs`
- `ViewModels/SettingsViewModel.cs`
- `Views/SettingsView.axaml`
- `App.axaml.cs`
- `Services/LocalizationService.cs`

---

## Done When
- [ ] Sessions view has Export PDF / Export Excel / Print buttons that produce a formatted daily schedule grouped by therapist
- [ ] Therapist can log in and sees only their own schedule for the day in a clean dedicated window
- [ ] Therapist login from a non-matching IP is blocked with a clear message
- [ ] Therapist can write a structured daily report for each session and save it
- [ ] Therapist can view the full history of any assigned child (sessions + reports chronologically)
- [ ] Child history exports to a formatted PDF and a formatted Word (.docx) file
- [ ] Admin can configure the allowed LAN subnet in Settings
- [ ] Build passes with zero errors

  - `ExportDailyReportAsync(TherapistReport)` → single-session report `.docx`
    - Professional layout with center header, child info, report body sections

### E — LAN Access Service
- **`Services/LanAccessService.cs`**:
  - `GetLocalIpAddresses()` — returns all local IPv4 addresses of the machine
  - `IsAllowedAccess(string allowedSubnet)` — returns `true` if any local IP starts with the subnet string
  - `GetAllowedSubnetAsync()` — reads `AllowedSubnet` from `DatabaseService`
- **Login flow** (`LoginViewModel`):
  - After password verification, if `user.Role == "Therapist"`, call `LanAccessService.IsAllowedAccess()`
  - If fails: show error "Access denied: connect from within the center's network"
  - If passes: route to `TherapistDashboardView` instead of `MainWindow` (Admin view)
- **Admin** login: no IP restriction, always routes to `MainWindow`

### F — Therapist Dashboard View + ViewModel
**`ViewModels/TherapistDashboardViewModel.cs`**
- Properties: `TodaySessions`, `SelectedSession`, `SelectedBeneficiary`, `Reports`, `Worksheets`, `IsReportFormOpen`
- On load: fetch sessions for the logged-in therapist for today
- Commands:
  - `LoadCommand` — load today's sessions + recent reports
  - `OpenReportCommand` — open report form for selected session
  - `ViewChildHistoryCommand` — show history popup for selected beneficiary
  - `ExportHistoryPdfCommand` — export child history as PDF
  - `ExportHistoryWordCommand` — export child history as Word doc
  - `ToggleLanguageCommand` — same bilingual toggle as admin
  - `LogoutCommand` — return to login

**`Views/TherapistDashboardView.axaml`**
- Left panel: today's session list (time, beneficiary name, session type, duration, status) with status badge colors
- Right panel (selected session): session details + "Write Report" / "View Past Reports" / "Add Worksheet" tabs
- Report form (inline modal): all `TherapistReport` fields as labeled text areas + rating stars
- Child history panel: chronological list of sessions+reports; export buttons at top
- Language toggle button (top-right)

**`Views/TherapistWindow.axaml` + `.axaml.cs`**
- Thin wrapper window for therapist role (similar to `MainWindow` but only hosts `TherapistDashboardView`)
- Title: center name + " — Therapist Portal"
- `FlowDirection` bound to `L.FlowDir`

### G — Role Routing in App.axaml.cs + LoginViewModel
- `LoginViewModel` receives two callbacks: `onAdminSuccess` and `onTherapistSuccess`
- `App.axaml.cs` handles both:
  - Admin → show `MainWindow`
  - Therapist → show `TherapistWindow`
- `TherapistWindow` is a standard `Window`; it is modal-independent from `MainWindow`
- Admin can still see all therapist reports inside `MainWindow` via a new "Therapist Reports" sub-section in the Sessions or HR Management area

### H — Settings: LAN Configuration (Admin only)
- `SettingsView.axaml` — new "Network" section with:
  - `AllowedSubnet` TextBox (e.g. "192.168.1." or "10.0.0.")
  - `TherapistPortalEnabled` toggle
  - Explanation label: "Therapist logins are only allowed from IPs matching this prefix"
- `SettingsViewModel` — load/save these two settings

### I — Localization Keys (LocalizationService.cs)
Add keys for all new UI strings in both Arabic and English (approx 30 new keys covering therapist dashboard, report form fields, history view, export buttons, LAN settings).

arguments.content:
<UserControl xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
             xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
             xmlns:materialIcons="clr-namespace:Material.Icons.Avalonia;assembly=Material.Icons.Avalonia"
             x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.TherapistDashboardView"
             x:DataType="vm:TherapistDashboardViewModel">

    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">

        <!-- Top Bar -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}" Padding="16,12">
            <Grid ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto">
                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Grid.Column="0" Kind="AccountCircle" Width="36" Height="36" Foreground="White" Margin="0,0,12,0"/>
                <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TherapistPortal]}" Foreground="White" FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding TherapistName}" Foreground="#ccddee" FontSize="13"/>
                </StackPanel>

                <Border Grid.Column="2" Background="#2255a0" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,6" Margin="8,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="CalendarToday" Width="18" Foreground="White"/>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TodayAppointments]}" Foreground="#aaccee" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalSessions}" Foreground="White" FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Border Grid.Column="3" Background="#1a5a30" CornerRadius="8" Padding="12,6" Margin="8,0">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileDocument" Width="18" Foreground="White"/>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TotalReports]}" Foreground="#aaeebb" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding TotalReports}" Foreground="White" FontSize="20" FontWeight="Bold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Border>
                <Button Grid.Column="4" Command="{Binding ToggleLanguageCommand}" Background="Transparent" Foreground="White" Margin="8,0" Padding="10,6">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L.LangToggleLabel}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"/>
                </Button>
                <Button Grid.Column="5" Command="{Binding LogoutCommand}" Background="{StaticResource ErrorBrush}" Foreground="White" Padding="10,6">
                    <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6">
                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Logout" Width="16"/>
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[NavLogout]}"/>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Button>
            </Grid>
        </Border>

        <!-- Main Content -->
        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="350,*">

            <!-- Left: Today's Sessions -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="0" RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                <Border Grid.Row="0" Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" Padding="16,12" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,1">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[TodaySchedule]}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="15"/>
                </Border>

                <ListBox Grid.Row="1" ItemsSource="{Binding TodaySessions}" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedSession}" Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,1,0" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}">
                    <ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                        <DataTemplate>
                            <Border Padding="12,10" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,0,0,1">
                                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="Auto,*">
                                    <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="3" Grid.Column="0"
                                            Width="4" CornerRadius="2" Margin="0,0,12,0"
                                            Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}"/>
                                    <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding Beneficiary.Name}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="14"/>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,2,0,0">
                                        <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Clock" Width="13" Foreground="{StaticResource TextSecondaryBrush}"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Time, StringFormat='{}{0:hh\\:mm}'}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="•" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding Duration, StringFormat='{}{0} min'}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="12"/>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="6" Margin="0,3,0,0">
                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2" Background="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SessionType}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
                                        </Border>
                                        <Border CornerRadius="4" Padding="6,2" Background="{StaticResource AccentBrush}">
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding Status}" Foreground="White" FontSize="11"/>
                                        </Border>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Grid>
                            </Border>
                        </DataTemplate>
                    </ListBox.ItemTemplate>
                </ListBox>

                <Border Grid.Row="2" Background="{StaticResource SurfaceBrush}" Padding="12" BorderBrush="{StaticResource BorderBrush}" BorderThickness="0,1,1,0">
                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SelectSessionPrompt]}" Classes="Subtitle" TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="12"/>
                </Border>
            </Grid>

            <!-- Right: Session Detail + Report + History -->
            <Grid Grid.Column="1" RowDefinitions="*">
                <TabControl SelectedIndex="{Binding SelectedTab}">

                    <!-- Tab 1: Write Report -->
                    <TabItem Header="{Binding L[WriteReport]}">
                        <ScrollViewer>
                            <StackPanel Margin="24" Spacing="16">
                                <Border Classes="Card" IsVisible="{Binding SelectedSession, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="16" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Beneficiary]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedSession.Beneficiary.Name}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SessionType]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedSession.SessionType}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Duration]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedSession.Duration, StringFormat='{}{0} min'}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Status]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedSession.Status}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                            <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding OpenReportCommand}">
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Pencil" Width="18"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[WriteReport]}"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </Button>
                                            <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ViewChildHistoryCommand}">
                                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="History" Width="18"/>
                                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ChildHistory]}"/>
                                                </StackPanel>
                                            </Button>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>

                                <Border Classes="Card" IsVisible="{Binding CurrentReport, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNotNull}}">
                                    <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*">
                                        <StackPanel Grid.Row="0" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                                            <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileCheck" Width="20" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ReportExistsFor]}" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource SuccessBrush}"/>
                                        </StackPanel>
                                        <Grid Grid.Row="1" ColumnDefinitions="*,*,*">
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Activities]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentReport.ActivitiesPerformed}" TextWrapping="Wrap" MaxLines="3" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Margin="8,0">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ChildResponse]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentReport.ChildResponse}" TextWrapping="Wrap" MaxLines="3" TextTrimming="CharacterEllipsis"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                            <StackPanel Grid.Column="2">
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[OverallRating]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding CurrentReport.OverallRating, StringFormat='★ {0}/5'}" FontSize="18" FontWeight="Bold" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                                            </StackPanel>
                                        </Grid>
                                    </Grid>
                                </Border>

                                <Border Classes="Card">
                                    <StackPanel>
                                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[RecentReports]}" FontWeight="Bold" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                                        <DataGrid ItemsSource="{Binding AllReports}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False" MaxHeight="300">
                                            <DataGrid.Columns>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الطفل" Binding="{Binding Session.Beneficiary.Name}" Width="*"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding ReportDate, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="110"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="التقييم" Binding="{Binding OverallRating}" Width="70"/>
                                                <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="80"/>
                                            </DataGrid.Columns>
                                        </DataGrid>
                                    </StackPanel>
                                </Border>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </ScrollViewer>
                    </TabItem>

                    <!-- Tab 2: Worksheet -->
                    <TabItem Header="{Binding L[Worksheet]}">
                        <Border Classes="Card" Margin="24">
                            <StackPanel>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[WorksheetDescription]}" Classes="Subtitle" Margin="0,0,0,16" TextWrapping="Wrap"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SelectSessionFirst]}" IsVisible="{Binding SelectedSession, Converter={x:Static ObjectConverters.IsNull}}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Border>
                    </TabItem>
                </TabControl>
            </Grid>
        </Grid>

        <!-- Report Form Modal -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#88000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsReportFormOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="720" MaxHeight="620" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,*,Auto">
                    <Grid Grid.Row="0" ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" Margin="0,0,0,16">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[DailySessionReport]}" Classes="Title"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding SelectedSession.Beneficiary.Name}" Classes="Subtitle"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8" VerticalAlignment="Center">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[OverallRating]}" VerticalAlignment="Center"/>
                            <NumericUpDown Value="{Binding OverallRating}" Minimum="1" Maximum="5" Width="100"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="/ 5 ★" VerticalAlignment="Center" FontSize="18" Foreground="{StaticResource WarningBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>

                    <ScrollViewer Grid.Row="1">
                        <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto,Auto" ColumnDefinitions="*,*" Margin="0,0,8,0">
                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[ActivitiesPerformed]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding Activities}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="0" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[ChildResponse]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="1" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding ChildResponse}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[GoalsAddressed]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding GoalsAddressed}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="2" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[BehaviorNotes]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="3" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding BehaviorNotes}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding L[HomeworkParent]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="0" Text="{Binding Homework}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,8,12"/>

                            <TextBlock Grid.Row="4" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding L[NextSessionPlan]}" FontWeight="SemiBold" Margin="0,0,0,4"/>
                            <TextBox Grid.Row="5" Grid.Column="1" Text="{Binding NextSessionPlan}" Height="80" TextWrapping="Wrap" AcceptsReturn="True" Margin="0,0,0,12"/>
                        </Grid>
                    </ScrollViewer>

                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="2" Orientation="Horizontal" HorizontalAlignment="Center" Spacing="12" Margin="0,16,0,0">
                        <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding SaveReportCommand}" Width="150">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="ContentSave" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[SaveReport]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                        <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding CancelReportCommand}" Width="120">
                            <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                                <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Cancel]}"/>
                            </StackPanel>
                        </Button>
                    </StackPanel>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>

        <!-- Child History Modal -->
        <Border Grid.Row="0" Grid.RowSpan="2" Background="#88000000" IsVisible="{Binding IsHistoryOpen}" HorizontalAlignment="Stretch" VerticalAlignment="Stretch">
            <Border Classes="Card" Width="900" MaxHeight="700" VerticalAlignment="Center" HorizontalAlignment="Center">
                <Grid RowDefinitions="Auto,Auto,*,Auto">
                    <Grid Grid.Row="0" ColumnDefinitions="*,Auto" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="0">
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ChildHistory]}" Classes="Title"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HistoryBeneficiary.Name}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="14"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel Grid.Column="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                            <Button Classes="Accent" Command="{Binding ExportHistoryPdfCommand}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FilePdf" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ExportPDF]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Classes="Primary" Command="{Binding ExportHistoryWordCommand}">
                                <StackPanel Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="8">
                                    <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="FileWord" Width="18"/>
                                    <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[ExportWord]}"/>
                                </StackPanel>
                            </Button>
                            <Button Command="{Binding CloseHistoryCommand}" Padding="8">
                                <materialIcons:MaterialIcon Kind="Close" Width="18"/>
                            </Button>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </Grid>

                    <StackPanel Grid.Row="1" Orientation="Horizontal" Spacing="24" Margin="0,0,0,12">
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[DisabilityType]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HistoryBeneficiary.DisabilityType}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[Diagnosis]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HistoryBeneficiary.Diagnosis}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[GuardianPhone]}" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HistoryBeneficiary.GuardianPhone}" FontWeight="SemiBold"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                        <StackPanel>
                            <TextBlock Text="Total Sessions" Classes="Subtitle" FontSize="11"/>
                            <TextBlock Text="{Binding HistoryList.Count}" FontWeight="Bold" FontSize="16" Foreground="{StaticResource PrimaryBrush}"/>
                        </StackPanel>
                    </StackPanel>

                    <DataGrid Grid.Row="2" ItemsSource="{Binding HistoryList}" IsReadOnly="True" AutoGenerateColumns="False">
                        <DataGrid.Columns>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="التاريخ" Binding="{Binding Date, StringFormat='{}{0:yyyy-MM-dd}'}" Width="110"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="نوع الجلسة" Binding="{Binding SessionType}" Width="130"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="المعالج" Binding="{Binding Therapist.Name}" Width="*"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="المدة" Binding="{Binding Duration, StringFormat='{}{0} min'}" Width="80"/>
                            <DataGridTextColumn Header="الحالة" Binding="{Binding Status}" Width="90"/>
                        </DataGrid.Columns>
                    </DataGrid>

                    <Border Grid.Row="3" Margin="0,8,0,0">
                        <TextBlock Text="{Binding L[HistoryNote]}" Classes="Subtitle" TextWrapping="Wrap" FontSize="12"/>
                    </Border>
                </Grid>
            </Border>
        </Border>
    </Grid>
</UserControl>

<Window xmlns="https://github.com/avaloniaui"
        xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2006/xaml"
        xmlns:vm="using:RehabCenterApp.ViewModels"
        xmlns:views="using:RehabCenterApp.Views"
        x:Class="RehabCenterApp.Views.TherapistWindow"
        x:DataType="vm:TherapistDashboardViewModel"
        Title="Therapist Portal"
        Width="1280" Height="800"
        MinWidth="900" MinHeight="600"
        WindowStartupLocation="CenterScreen"
        FlowDirection="{Binding L.FlowDir}">

    <views:TherapistDashboardView DataContext="{Binding}"/>
</Window>
